chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1036 of 2018 C. P. No. D – 1439 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.5011/2023 (151 CPC) 2. For orders on CMA No.9230/2018 (C/A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.5577/2018 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 13-03-2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioners in C. P. No. D-1036 of 2018. Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Advocate for petitioner in C. P. No. D-1439 of 2019. Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate for respondents No.5 to 11 in C. P. No. D-1036 of 2018. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Advocate for respondent No.2 in C.P.No.D- 1036 of 2018. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents-Sukkur Municipal Corporation. M/s Najamuddin Dharejo and Bahawal Din Special Prosecutors NAB. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners submit that they would be satisfied and will not press both petitions if petitioners are permitted to file relevant proceedings before the Appellate Tribunal Local Councils Sindh at Sukkur for redressal of their grievance(s) i.e. promotion and genuineness of appointment with observation that Tribunal shall expedite the matter and decide the same preferably within a period of four months. Learned counsel appearing for the other side have recorded no objection. Accordingly, both listed petitions along with pending application(s) are disposed of in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
